title: arabis umbrosa var. glandulosa
intro: Arabis umbrosa var. glandulosa, also known as Rock Cress, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Rock Cress include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rock Cress include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Rock Cress is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
